description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to the master branch, with concurrency settings to cancel in-progress jobs for the same reference. The workflow consists of two jobs: build-product and integration. The build-product job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, sets up Python, downloads Android Python builds, installs requirements, creates local properties, builds the product, and uploads the Maven repository. The integration job depends on build-product, runs on a matrix of OS and AGP versions, checks out the repository, sets up Python with extra versions, downloads the Maven repository, installs requirements, creates local properties, and runs tests.
